description: HIT when the food is fully baked
SHAKE to blend the ingredients
HIT to slice the ingredient
POUR the ingredient into the batter
Time your HITs to crack the eggs
SWING LEFT and RIGHT to grind the ingredients
SWING LEFT and RIGHT to knead the batter
Perform ANY motion with your phone to pick the ingredient required
POUR the jar, then SHAKE it
STIR to mix the ingredients well
POUR the ingredient into the bowl
HIT to dice the ingredient
SHAKE to grate the ingredient
LIFT the cap when the food has fully steamed
POUR the jar, then SHAKE it
LIFT when you have gathered your energy
SPIN to wrap the food up
POUR the jar, then SHAKE it
FAN to maintain the heat
SPIN to flip the food
